glosses.fr: pièce de monnaie; hôtel des monnaies
glosses.vi: đồng xu; nhà máy đúc tiền

translations.en: I don't have a coin on me.
translations.fr: Je n'ai pas de pièce sur moi.
translations.ru: У меня с собой нет монеты.
translations.vi: Tôi không có đồng xu nào trên người.
translations.ar: لا أملك أي قطعة نقدية معي.
translations.nl: Ik heb geen munt bij me.
translations.uk: У мене з собою немає монети.
translations.hi: मेरे पास कोई सिक्का नहीं है.
translations.el: Δεν έχω πάνω μου ούτε ένα κέρμα.
translations.nb: Jeg har ikke en mynt på meg.
translations.sv: Jag har inget mynt på mig.
translations.ro: Nu am nicio monedă la mine.
translations.da: Jeg har ikke en mønt på mig.
translations.fi: Minulla ei ole yhtään kolikkoa mukana.
translations.ja: 今、硬貨を持っていません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st sg, present) of the separable verb ‘dabeihaben’ (‘to have with one’); selects the object ‘keine Münze’ and the particle ‘dabei’.
Negative determiner; agrees with feminine singular accusative noun ‘Münze’; negates the existence of the object.
Feminine noun, singular, accusative; direct object of ‘habe’.
Separable verbal particle of ‘dabeihaben’; positioned at clause end, contributes the sense ‘with one/along’.

sentences.target: Er wirft die Münze ins Wasser.

translations.de: Er wirft die Münze ins Wasser.
translations.en: He throws the coin into the water.
translations.fr: Il jette la pièce dans l'eau.
translations.pt: Ele joga a moeda na água.
translations.vi: Anh ấy ném đồng xu xuống nước.
translations.ar: هو يرمي القطعة النقدية في الماء.
translations.nl: Hij gooit de munt in het water.
translations.hi: वह सिक्का पानी में फेंकता है.
translations.id: Dia melempar koin ke dalam air.
translations.ja: 彼は硬貨を水に投げる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (3rd sg, present); transitive, taking ‘die Münze’ as direct object and the directional PP ‘ins Wasser’ as goal.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; modifies ‘Münze’ (direct object).
Feminine noun, singular, accusative; direct object of ‘wirft’.
Preposition in fused form (‘ins’ = ‘in das’); governs accusative here (direction), introducing the PP ‘ins Wasser’.
Neuter noun, singular, accusative; object of the preposition ‘ins’, marking the goal of motion.

translations.en: There's a coin lying on the counter.
translations.es: Hay una moneda en la barra.
translations.fr: Il y a une pièce sur le comptoir.
translations.vi: Trên quầy có một đồng xu.
translations.nl: Er ligt een munt op de toonbank.
translations.hi: काउंटर पर एक सिक्का पड़ा है.
translations.el: Πάνω στον πάγκο βρίσκεται ένα κέρμα.
translations.nb: Det ligger en mynt på disken.
translations.id: Ada sebuah koin di atas konter.
translations.sv: Det ligger ett mynt på disken.
translations.ro: Pe tejghea se află o monedă.
translations.da: Der ligger en mønt på disken.
translations.ja: カウンターの上に硬貨が一枚置いてある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition in fused form (‘am’ = ‘an dem’); governs dative for static location; introduces the PP with ‘Tresen’.
Masculine noun, singular, dative; object of ‘am’, specifying the location.
Intransitive finite verb (3rd sg, present); predicates existence/location.
Indefinite article; feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject ‘Münze’.
Feminine noun, singular, nominative; grammatical subject of ‘liegt’, the theme located at ‘am Tresen’.

sentences.target: Die Kellnerin zählt jede Münze genau.

translations.de: Die Kellnerin zählt jede Münze genau.
translations.en: The waitress counts every coin carefully.
translations.es: La camarera cuenta cada moneda con cuidado.
translations.fr: La serveuse compte chaque pièce avec soin.
translations.it: La cameriera conta ogni moneta con attenzione.
translations.zh-Hans: 女服务员仔细地数着每一枚硬币。
translations.yue: 侍應逐個硬幣仔細咁數。
translations.pt: A garçonete conta cada moeda com cuidado.
translations.tr: Garson her bir madeni parayı dikkatle sayıyor.
translations.vi: Cô phục vụ đếm từng đồng xu một cách cẩn thận.
translations.ar: النادلة تعد كل قطعة نقدية بعناية.
translations.nl: De serveerster telt elke munt zorgvuldig.
translations.hu: A pincérnő gondosan megszámol minden egyes érmét.
translations.hi: वेट्रेस हर सिक्के को ध्यान से गिनती है.
translations.el: Η σερβιτόρα μετρά προσεκτικά κάθε κέρμα.
translations.nb: Servitrisen teller nøye hver eneste mynt.
translations.id: Pramusaji perempuan menghitung setiap koin dengan saksama.
translations.da: Servitricen tæller omhyggeligt hver eneste mønt.
translations.ja: ウェイトレスが一枚一枚の硬貨を丁寧に数えている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; modifies ‘Kellnerin’ (subject).
Feminine noun, singular, nominative; subject of ‘zählt’.
Finite verb (3rd sg, present); transitive, taking ‘jede Münze’ as direct object; modified by the manner adverb ‘genau’.
Quantificational determiner; feminine singular accusative; modifies ‘Münze’, indicating distributive scope.
Feminine noun, singular, accusative; direct object of ‘zählt’.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb ‘zählt’, specifying precision.
